fields.Name: Sage Intacct
fields.Description: Sage Intacct cloud accounting and ERP integration via the XML Web Services API (POST-only XML gateway). Covers all business objects including AP, AR, GL, Projects, Inventory, Contracts, Order Entry, Purchasing, and more.

fields.Name: RECORDNO
fields.Description: Primary key

fields.Name: PERIOD
fields.Description: Budgetable reporting period name. These are the reporting periods shown on the Reporting Periods list with the budgetable flag set to true . System periods (Today, Current Month, Current Year to Date, etc) and non-budgetable reporting periods are not supported.

fields.Name: ACCOUNTNO
fields.Description: Account number

fields.Name: ACCOUNTREC
fields.Description: Account record number

fields.Name: ACCOUNTTITLE

fields.Name: BOOKID
fields.Description: Reporting book ID. System standard book IDs include ACCRUAL , CASH , GAAPADJACCRUAL , GAAPADJCASH , TAXADJACCRUAL , TAXADJCASH , GAAPACCRUAL , GAAPCASH , TAXACCRUAL , TAXCASH , GAAPTAXACCRUAL , and GAAPTAXCASH . Keep in mind, these are dependent on the company/GL configuration. In addition to these, a Sage Intacct company may also have User Defined Books and/or Consolidation books. In the case of User Defined Books, the system appends ACCRUAL and CASH to the end of the User Defined Book ID to...

If the base and transaction currency are different, filter for the base currency or both amounts will be included in response even if running from the entity.

fields.Description: How the transaction allocation is split across dimensions. Use Percentage to specify entries as percentages (default). Use Absolute to specify entries as fixed amounts. Use Fixed amount with over/under logic for a combination of both. Exact amounts are distributed first, in the order they occur in the transaction allocation definition. Any remaining amount is distributed using the percentage allocations. Entries for exact amounts must come before entries for percentages, and percentages must ...

fields.Name: TOTALTRXAMOUNT
fields.Description: Transaction amount for the line including taxes, which is required if INCLUSIVETAX is set to true on the header. The system uses the value you provide here and the tax rate of the tax detail ( DETAILID ) for the tax entry to calculate the transaction amount ( TRX_AMOUNT ) for the line and transaction tax ( TRX_TAX ) for the tax entry. (AU, GB, ZA only)

fields.Name: TRX_AMOUNT
fields.Description: Transaction amount before taxes. This value is required if INCLUSIVETAX is set to false (or omitted) on the header. (This value will be ignored as an input if INCLUSIVETAX is true because the value will be calculated for you.)

fields.Name: TRX_TAX
fields.Description: Transaction tax, which is your manually calculated value for the tax. The amount of the tax line is automatically included in the amount due ( TOTAL_DUE ) for the bill. Providing a value here overrides any calculated values.

fields.Name: PAYMENTDATE

fields.Name: ACCOUNTLABEL

fields.Name: BILLABLE

fields.Name: CLASSID

fields.Name: COSTTYPEID
fields.Description: Cost type ID. Only available when projectid and taskid are specified. (Construction subscription)

fields.Name: CURRENCY

fields.Name: CUSTOMERID
fields.Description: Customer ID

fields.Name: DEPARTMENTID

fields.Name: DESCRIPTION

fields.Name: EMPLOYEEID

fields.Name: EXCHRATE

fields.Name: EXCHRATEDATE

fields.Name: EXCHRATETYPE
fields.Description: Exchange rate type. Do not use if exchrate is set. (Leave blank to use Intacct Daily Rate )

fields.Name: GLACCOUNTNO
fields.Description: Account number. Cannot use if using accountlabel instead.

fields.Name: INCLUSIVETAX
fields.Description: Inclusive taxes. Set to true to have the system calculate the transaction amount ( trx_amount ) for the charge card transaction line and the transaction tax ( trx_tax ) for the tax entry based on the value supplied for totaltrxamount on the transaction line and the tax rate of the tax detail ( detailid ) for the tax entry. (AU, GB, ZA only). (Default: false )

fields.Name: ITEMID
fields.Description: Item ID

fields.Name: LOCATIONID
fields.Description: LOCATIONID of an active location . Required if company is multi-entity enabled.

fields.Name: MEMO

fields.Name: PAYEE

fields.Name: PROJECTID

fields.Name: REFERENCENO
fields.Description: Reference number

fields.Name: SUPDOCID
fields.Description: Attachments ID

fields.Name: TASKID
fields.Description: Task ID. Only available when the parent projectid is also specified.

fields.Name: TAXENTRIES
fields.Description: Tax entries for the line. Required for VAT enabled transactions. Providing multiple entries is allowed if your tax solution supports it (AU and GB only). For ZA, only one tax entry is allowed.

fields.Name: TAXSOLUTIONID
fields.Description: Tax solution name, such as United Kingdom - VAT or Australia - GST . Required only if the company is configured for multiple tax jurisdictions and the transaction is occurring at the top level of the company. The available tax solution names can be found in the Sage Intacct UI in the Taxes application from the top level of a multi-entity company. (GB, AU, and ZA only)

fields.Name: TOTALTRXAMOUNT
fields.Description: Total transaction amount. Required if inclusive tax is set to true .

fields.Name: TRX_TAX
fields.Description: Transaction tax, which is a manually calculated value to override the calculated value for the tax. The amount of the tax line is automatically included in the transaction amount ( trx_amount ).

fields.Name: UPDATECCPAYITEMS
fields.Description: To update an existing line use updateccpayitem , otherwise to create a new line use ccpayitem . You can mix types in the array.

fields.Name: VENDORID
fields.Description: Vendor ID

fields.Name: WAREHOUSEID
fields.Description: Warehouse ID

fields.Name: WHENMODIFIED
fields.Description: Last modified timestamp (used as incremental-sync watermark)

fields.Name: CHANGEREQUEST
fields.Description: Sage Intacct Construction object: Changerequest

fields.Name: CHANGEREQUESTENTRY.RECORDNO
fields.Description: RECORDNO of a change request entry to update. Omit to create a new entry.

fields.Name: RECORDNO
fields.Description: RECORDNO of the change request to update. Required if not using CHANGEREQUESTID .

fields.Name: CHANGEREQUESTDATE
fields.Description: Date for the request in the mm/dd/yyyy format

fields.Name: CHANGEREQUESTENTRY.PROJECTID
fields.Description: ID of a project, either the same project specified on the header or one of its descendants. Required when creating a new change request entry. A descendant can only be specified if it has the same customer as the parent project and either the same location as the parent or a descendant of that location.

fields.Name: CHANGEREQUESTID
fields.Description: Unique ID of the change request to update. Required if not using RECORDNO .

fields.Name: PROJECTID
fields.Description: ID of an existing project

fields.Name: ACTUALCOMPLETIONDATE
fields.Description: Date the work is actually complete in the mm/dd/yyyy format

fields.Name: ACTUALSTARTDATE
fields.Description: Actual start date in the mm/dd/yyyy format

fields.Name: CHANGEREQUESTENTRIES
fields.Description: Change request entries

fields.Name: CHANGEREQUESTENTRY.ACCOUNTNO
fields.Description: GL account number to use when posting this change request (if you want to override the account number on the cost type for this entry). Your company must be configured to allow this override. Note that an account number is needed when the specified project ID has a primary estimate that posts to the GL budget, and the change request status is set to a value other than none .

fields.Name: CHANGEREQUESTENTRY.CLASSID
fields.Description: Class ID

fields.Name: CHANGEREQUESTENTRY.COST
fields.Description: Cost of the entry. If not supplied, the system can calculate this value using quantity times unit cost.

fields.Name: CHANGEREQUESTENTRY.COSTTYPEID
fields.Description: Cost type ID

fields.Name: CHANGEREQUESTENTRY.DEPARTMENTID
fields.Description: Department ID

fields.Name: CHANGEREQUESTENTRY.EMPLOYEEID
fields.Description: Employee ID

fields.Name: CHANGEREQUESTENTRY.EUOM
fields.Description: External unit of measure. Free form field with 200 or fewer characters.

fields.Name: CHANGEREQUESTENTRY.ITEMID
fields.Description: Item ID

fields.Name: CHANGEREQUESTENTRY.MEMO
fields.Description: Memo for the entry. Use 2000 or fewer characters.

fields.Name: CHANGEREQUESTENTRY.PRICE
fields.Description: Price of the entry. If not supplied, the system can calculate this value using quantity times unit price.

fields.Name: CHANGEREQUESTENTRY.PRICEMARKUPAMOUNT
fields.Description: Markup amount to add to the price of the entry. If not supplied, the system can calculate this value using the price and markup percent. The sum of the price and price markup amount is the value for the read-only line price ( LINEPRICE ) parameter.

fields.Name: CHANGEREQUESTENTRY.PRICEMARKUPPERCENT
fields.Description: Markup percent for the entry

fields.Name: CHANGEREQUESTENTRY.PRODUCTIONUNITS
fields.Description: Number of production units, which are units that track several inputs of cost (such as for material, labor, equipment). When specifying production units, you must also provide a task ID, from which the production unit description, if present, is inherited.

fields.Name: CHANGEREQUESTENTRY.PROJECTCONTRACTID
fields.Description: PROJECTCONTRACTID of the project contract affected by this change request entry. Required if PROJECTCONTRACTLINEID is provided.

fields.Name: CHANGEREQUESTENTRY.PROJECTCONTRACTLINEID
fields.Description: PROJECTCONTRACTLINEID of the specific project contract line that is affected by this change request entry. Required if PROJECTCONTRACTID is provided.

fields.Name: CHANGEREQUESTENTRY.QTY
fields.Description: Quantity

fields.Name: CHANGEREQUESTENTRY.TASKID
fields.Description: Task ID. Required if you specify production units.

fields.Name: CHANGEREQUESTENTRY.UNITCOST
fields.Description: Unit cost, also known as unit rate

fields.Name: CHANGEREQUESTENTRY.UNITPRICE
fields.Description: Unit price

fields.Name: CHANGEREQUESTENTRY.VENDORID
fields.Description: Vendor ID

fields.Name: CHANGEREQUESTSTATE
fields.Description: State of the change request. Use Draft to save without posting (regardless of the status of the change request or the mapped estimate workflow type), or Posted to allow posting to proceed as configured. You cannot change a Posted change request back to Draft .

fields.Name: CHANGEREQUESTSTATUSNAME
fields.Description: Name of a change request status that is mapped to the workflow type you want for this change request (a workflow type other than none enables posting to the primary project estimate). If you omit this parameter, the change request automatically gets a workflow type of none .

fields.Name: CHANGEREQUESTTYPENAME
fields.Description: Name of a change request type . Useful for reporting purposes.

fields.Name: COSTEFFECTIVEDATE
fields.Description: Cost effective date of the change request. When posting change request entries to a project estimate, the estimate entry EFFECTIVEDATE field will be populated from this value. If the COSTEFFECTIVEDATE is null, the estimate entry EFFECTIVEDATE field will be populated with the change request date.

fields.Name: Custom field name
fields.Description: Custom field names and values as defined for this object. For a multi-pick-list custom field, implode multiple field values with #~# .

fields.Name: DESCRIPTION
fields.Description: Description of the change request. Use 1000 or fewer characters.

fields.Name: EXCLUSIONS
fields.Description: Details related to items that are explicitly excluded in the terms of this change request. Use 4000 or fewer characters.

fields.Name: EXECUTEDON
fields.Description: Date the related contract document was formally executed in the mm/dd/yyyy format

fields.Name: EXTERNALAPPROVEDBY
fields.Description: Name of the contact who approved the change request. For example, a customer or vendor contact.

fields.Name: EXTERNALAPPROVEDBYKEY
fields.Description: Record number of the contact who approved the change request. For example, a customer or vendor contact.

fields.Name: EXTERNALAPPROVEDON
fields.Description: Date the customer or vendor approved the change request in the mm/dd/yyyy format

fields.Name: EXTERNALREFNO
fields.Description: External reference number, such as one required by a vendor or customer, for this change request.

fields.Name: EXTERNALSIGNEDBY
fields.Description: Name of the contact who signed the change request. For example, a customer or vendor contact.

fields.Name: EXTERNALSIGNEDBYKEY
fields.Description: Record number of the contact who signed the change request. For example, a customer or vendor contact.

fields.Name: EXTERNALSIGNEDON
fields.Description: Date the customer or vendor signed for the change request the mm/dd/yyyy format

fields.Name: EXTERNALVERBALBY
fields.Description: Name of the contact who verbally agreed to the change request. For example, a customer or vendor contact.

fields.Name: EXTERNALVERBALBYKEY
fields.Description: Record number of the contact who verbally agreed to the change request. For example, a customer or vendor contact.

fields.Name: INCLUSIONS
fields.Description: Details related to items that are explicitly included in the terms of this change request. Use 4000 or fewer characters.

fields.Name: INTERNALAPPROVEDBY
fields.Description: ID of the employee who internally approved the change request

fields.Name: INTERNALAPPROVEDBYKEY
fields.Description: Record number of the employee who internally approved the change request.

fields.Name: INTERNALAPPROVEDBYNAME
fields.Description: Name of the employee who internally approved the change request

fields.Name: INTERNALAPPROVEDON
fields.Description: Date this change request was internally approved in the mm/dd/yyyy format

fields.Name: INTERNALINITIATEDBY
fields.Description: ID of the employee who initiated the change request

fields.Name: INTERNALINITIATEDBYKEY
fields.Description: Record number of the employee who initiated the change request

fields.Name: INTERNALINITIATEDBYNAME
fields.Description: Name of the employee who initiated the change request

fields.Name: INTERNALISSUEDBY
fields.Description: ID of the employee who issued the change request

fields.Name: INTERNALISSUEDBYKEY
fields.Description: Record number of the employee who issued the change request

fields.Name: INTERNALISSUEDBYNAME
fields.Description: Name of the employee who issued the change request

fields.Name: INTERNALISSUEDON
fields.Description: Date this change request was internally issued in the mm/dd/yyyy format

fields.Name: INTERNALREFNO
fields.Description: Specifies an internal reference ID

fields.Name: INTERNALSIGNEDBY
fields.Description: ID of the employee who signed for the change request

fields.Name: INTERNALSIGNEDBYKEY
fields.Description: Record number of the employee who signed for the change request

fields.Name: INTERNALSIGNEDBYNAME
fields.Description: Name of the employee who signed for the change request

fields.Name: INTERNALSIGNEDON
fields.Description: Date the change request was internally signed in the mm/dd/yyyy format.

fields.Name: INTERNALSOURCE
fields.Description: Internal source when the change request originated from another document or workflow. Can be an internal or external source. For example, a request for information (RFI) or a project change request.

fields.Name: INTERNALSOURCEREFNO
fields.Description: Internal source reference number or ID when the change request originated from another source. Can be an internal or external number.

fields.Name: INTERNALVERBALBY
fields.Description: ID of the employee who verbally agreed to the change request

fields.Name: INTERNALVERBALBYKEY
fields.Description: Record number of of the employee who verbally agreed to the change request

fields.Name: INTERNALVERBALBYNAME
fields.Description: Name of the employee who verbally agreed to the change request

fields.Name: NOTICETOPROCEED
fields.Description: Date when a formal notice to proceed was given in the mm/dd/yyyy format

fields.Name: PCNINTEGRATIONLEVEL
fields.Description: Where this change request integrates with project contracts: none - (default) PROJECTCONTRACTID and PROJECTCONTRACTLINEID cannot be used. project change order - PROJECTCONTRACTID and PROJECTCONTRACTLINEID are inherited from the project change order. change request - PROJECTCONTRACTID and PROJECTCONTRACTLINEID can be used on the change request and will be inherited by the change request entries. change request entry - PROJECTCONTRACTID and PROJECTCONTRACTLINEID can be entered on change request...

fields.Name: PRICEEFFECTIVEDATE
fields.Description: Price effective date of the change request.

fields.Name: PROJECTCHANGEORDERID
fields.Description: Identifier of a project change order to link to. Only allowed if the change request state is Posted . Pass an empty project change order ID to delete it.

fields.Name: PROJECTCONTRACTID
fields.Description: PROJECTCONTRACTID of the project contract affected by this change request. Required if PROJECTCONTRACTLINEID is provided.

fields.Name: PROJECTCONTRACTLINEID
fields.Description: PROJECTCONTRACTLINEID of the specific project contract line that is affected by this change request. Required if PROJECTCONTRACTID is provided.

fields.Name: RESPONSEDUE
fields.Description: Date when a response is expected from an external party in the mm/dd/yyyy format

fields.Name: REVISEDCOMPLETIONDATE
fields.Description: Revised completion date for the work (caused by changes) in the mm/dd/yyyy format.

fields.Name: SCHEDULEDCOMPLETIONDATE
fields.Description: Original scheduled date for completion of the work in the mm/dd/yyyy format

fields.Name: SCHEDULEDSTARTDATE
fields.Description: Scheduled start date in the mm/dd/yyyy format

fields.Name: SCHEDULEIMPACT
fields.Description: Details about any impacts on the current schedule. Use 100 or fewer characters.

fields.Name: SCOPE
fields.Description: Details about the expected scope of work for the change request. Use 4000 or fewer characters.

fields.Name: SUBSTANTIALCOMPLETIONDATE
fields.Description: Date the work is considered substantially complete in the mm/dd/yyyy format. Typically used as a milestone to identify when payment obligations are due.

fields.Name: SUPDOCID
fields.Description: Attachments ID

fields.Name: TERMS
fields.Description: Additional terms or performance obligations. Use 4000 or fewer characters.

fields.Description: Last modified timestamp (used as incremental-sync watermark)

fields.Name: WFTYPE
fields.Description: Workflow type for the entry. none (default) original revision forecast pending change approved change other

fields.Name: Custom field name

fields.Description: Sage Intacct Inventory Control object: Cogsclosedje

fields.Name: RECORDNO
fields.Description: Record number of the cost of goods sold adjustment to apply

fields.Name: ASOFDATE
fields.Description: As of date for the sales transaction

fields.Name: COST
fields.Description: Amount of the previously applied adjustment

fields.Name: CREATEDON
fields.Description: GL post date of a previously applied COGS adjustment

fields.Name: CURRENTCOST
fields.Description: Current cost of the line

fields.Name: CURRENTGLCOGS

fields.Name: CUSTOMER

fields.Name: DIFFERENCE
fields.Description: Difference between current cost of the line and current GL journal post

fields.Name: DOCUMENTNAME

fields.Name: FIXUNIQUEID
fields.Description: Unique ID of the adjustment

fields.Name: ITEMID
fields.Description: Item Id

fields.Name: LOCATION
fields.Description: Location ID of warehouse (for multi-entity/multi-currency company)

fields.Name: NEEDSADJUSTMENT
fields.Description: Needs adjustment. Use true to list all potential adjusting journal entries, or use false to list adjustments that have already been applied. Adjustments already applied have a FIXUNIQUEID value that can be used to reverse the adjustment. (Default: true )

fields.Name: POSTINGDATE
fields.Description: Posting date in format mm/dd/yyyy (Default: first date in first available open period)

fields.Name: WAREHOUSE
fields.Description: Warehouse ID

fields.Name: WHENMODIFIED

fields.Name: COMPLIANCEDEFINITION
fields.Description: Sage Intacct Purchasing object: Compliancedefinition

fields.Name: RECORDNO
fields.Description: RECORDNO of the compliance definition to update. Required if not using COMPLIANCEDEFINITIONID .

fields.Name: CATEGORY
fields.Description: Requirement category: Insurance - use for general liability insurance, workers comp insurance, etc. Lien waiver - use to ensure that subcontractors and suppliers have signed lien waiver agreements before releasing payment. Automatically generates lien waiver documents at AP bill or AP payment creation for transaction definitions in which PRIMARYDOC is set to true. When Lien waiver is used, then ALLOWNEGATIVELIENWAIVERS may be set. Miscellaneous - use for permits, licenses, bonds, etc.

fields.Name: COMPLIANCEDEFINITIONID
fields.Description: ID of the compliance definition to update. Required if not using RECORDNO .

fields.Name: PAYMENTNOTIFICATION
fields.Description: Action to take when a vendor is out of compliance with this definition and a payment is attempted: Ignore - no error returned and payments to the vendor are allowed (default) Warning - a warning is returned and payments to the vendor are still allowed Error - an error is returned and payments to the vendor are blocked.

fields.Name: VALIDATIONRULE
fields.Description: How compliance will be validated. Options depend on the CATEGORY value: Expiration date - For Insurance and Miscellaneous categories. Document received - For Miscellaneous and Lien waiver categories.

fields.Name: ALLOWNEGATIVELIENWAIVERS
fields.Description: Use true (default) to indicate that lien waivers can be generated with negative amounts, otherwise use false . Applies only when CATEGORY is set to Lien waiver . If CATEGORY is not Lien waiver and a value is supplied, an error is returned. This value only affects the generation of future lien waiver compliance records.

fields.Name: COMPDEFENTRIES
fields.Description: List of vendor types or primary document IDs for which to generate compliance records when GENERATERULE is set to Automatic by type . Options are: VENDTYPENAME - The name of a vendor type. Used when TRACKBY is set to Vendor . DOCPARID - The ID of a purchasing transaction definition that has PRIMARYDOCUMENT set to true . Used when TRACKBY is set to Primarydoc .

fields.Name: DESCRIPTION
fields.Description: Description of the compliance definition.

fields.Name: GENERATEFOREACH
fields.Description: The type of transaction for which to generate lien waiver documents. Required if CATEGORY is set to Lien waiver ; not applicable to other categories. APBill - Generate lien waiver documents for bills (default) APPayment - Generate lien waiver documents for payments

fields.Name: GENERATERULE
fields.Description: Indicates whether to automatically generate compliance records and how to do so. For example, users can select which vendor types automatically generate compliance records. Do not generate - Compliance records are not generated automatically. (default) Automatic by type - Generate compliance records based on the list of types in COMPDEFENTRIES .

fields.Name: MINLIENWAIVERAMOUNT
fields.Description: When CATEGORY is set to Lien waiver , sets a minimum amount required for a lien waiver to be generated. For example, users might want orders of less than $10,000, which might be partial orders, to not require a lien waiver. Use 0 or a null value for no minimum.

fields.Name: MINPRIMARYDOCAMOUNT
fields.Description: When CATEGORY is set to Lien waiver , sets a minimum amount required for a lien waiver to be generated based on the primary document. For example, users might want orders of less than $10,000, which might be partial orders, to not require a lien waiver. Use 0 or a null value for no minimum.

fields.Name: STATUS
fields.Description: Status of compliance definition. active - the compliance record can be assigned to compliance types, and compliance records are validated against the definition. (default) inactive - The compliance definition is not used in compliance validation, and cannot be used to create a new compliance type.

fields.Name: TRACKBY
fields.Description: The objects that the compliance definition can be applied to. Vendor - When CATEGORY is set to Insurance or Miscellaneous . Primarydoc - When CATEGORY is set to Lien waiver , Insurance , or Miscellaneous

fields.Name: WHENMODIFIED
fields.Description: Last modified timestamp (used as incremental-sync watermark)

fields.Name: COMPLIANCERECORD
fields.Description: Sage Intacct Purchasing object: Compliancerecord

fields.Name: RECORDNO
fields.Description: RECORDNO of the compliance record to update.

fields.Name: COMPLIANCETYPEID
fields.Description: ID of the compliance type to use to create the compliance record. The COMPLIANCERECORDID for the new compliance record will be generated by the system using the document sequence specified in the compliance type.

fields.Name: VENDORID
fields.Description: ID of the vendor that this compliance record applies to.

fields.Name: ADDITIONALINSURED
fields.Description: Use true to indicate that the contractor is listed as an additional insured on the policy, otherwise use false . (Default: false )

fields.Name: AMOUNT
fields.Description: The amount of insurance coverage provided, for capturing insurance liability limitation. Used for reporting.

fields.Name: CONTACTNAME
fields.Description: The name of a contact to associate with this compliance record.

fields.Name: DESCRIPTION
fields.Description: Description of the compliance record.

fields.Name: DOCUMENTRECEIVED
fields.Description: Use true to indicate that the required compliance document has been received, otherwise use false . If the VALIDATIONRULE in the applicable compliance definition is set to Document received , this value is used to determine compliance. (Default: false )

fields.Name: EFFECTIVEDATE
fields.Description: Date when policy or document becomes effective. Used for reporting.

fields.Name: EXPIRATIONDATE
fields.Description: Date when the policy or document expires. If the VALIDATIONRULE in the applicable compliance definition is set to Expiration date , this value is checked when payment to the vendor is initiated.

fields.Name: FINALCOMPLIANCE
fields.Description: Applicable only when the Category is âLien waiverâ. Indictes whether the compliance record is finalized. Options are true or false (default). If CATEGORY is not set to Lien waiver and a value is supplied, then an error is returned.

fields.Name: NOTES
fields.Description: Text field for user-added notes. Use 4000 or fewer characters.

fields.Name: NOTIFICATIONOVERRIDE
fields.Description: Use true to override the PAYMENTNOTIFICATION setting defined in the compliance definition so that the vendor can be paid even if out-of-compliance, otherwise use false . (Default: false )

fields.Name: POLICYNUMBER
fields.Description: The policy or document number for this record.

fields.Name: PROJECTID
fields.Description: Unique user-defined project identifier. Should refer to an existing, active or inactive project record. The project is retrieved from the primary document header.

fields.Name: RECEIVEDBYID
fields.Description: The ID of the employee who received the compliance document.

fields.Name: RECEIVEDDATE
fields.Description: The date that the compliance document was received.

fields.Name: REFERENCENUMBER
fields.Description: Document reference number.

fields.Name: SECONDARYVENDOR
fields.Description: Boolean field that indicates whether a lien waiver is generated for the secondary vendor for compliance purposes. When lien waivers are generated from the primary document, this field is set to true . Additionally, the secondary vendor compliance template is used when the printed document template for the compliance records is printed and emailed.

fields.Name: SECONDARYVENDORNAME
fields.Description: The name of the secondary vendor, if one is used. When a secondary vendor is used and a lien waiver is created for compliance purposes, the value of this field defaults to the secondary vendor name that appears on the primary document. Otherwise, this field can be null.

fields.Name: SENDTOCONTACTNAME
fields.Description: The name of the contact to whom the lien waiver will be sent. Applies only when CATEGORY is Lien waiver . If CATEGORY is not set to Lien waiver and a value is supplied, then an error is returned.

fields.Name: STATUS
fields.Description: Status of compliance record: active - the compliance record is used for compliance validation. (default) inactive - The compliance record is not counted in compliance validation.

fields.Name: SUBROGATIONWAIVER
fields.Description: Use true to indicate that the policy includes a subrogation waiver, otherwise use false . (Default: false )

fields.Name: SUPDOCID
fields.Description: The reference number of any supporting documentation.

fields.Name: WHENMODIFIED
fields.Description: Last modified timestamp (used as incremental-sync watermark)

fields.Name: COMPLIANCETYPE
fields.Description: Sage Intacct Purchasing object: Compliancetype

fields.Name: RECORDNO
fields.Description: RECORDNO of the compliance type to update. Required if not using COMPLIANCETYPEID

fields.Name: COMPLIANCEDEFINITIONID
fields.Description: ID of the compliance definition that will be enforced in all compliance records created from this compliance type.

fields.Name: COMPLIANCETYPEID
fields.Description: COMPLIANCETYPEID of the compliance type to update. Required is not using RECORDNO .

fields.Name: SEQNUMID
fields.Description: The ID of the document sequence to use to create the COMPLIANCERECORDID of compliance records that are created from this compliance type.

fields.Name: DESCRIPTION
fields.Description: Description of the compliance type.

fields.Name: STATUS
fields.Description: Status of compliance type: active - the compliance type can be assigned to compliance records. (default) inactive - The compliance type cannot be used to create new compliance records. Existing compliance records that use the compliance type are still active.

fields.Name: WHENMODIFIED
fields.Description: Last modified timestamp (used as incremental-sync watermark)

fields.Description: Sage Intacct Company and Console object: Contact

fields.Name: RECORDNO
fields.Description: Record number of contact to update. Required if not using CONTACTNAME .

fields.Name: CONTACTNAME
fields.Description: Contact name. Required if not using RECORDNO .

fields.Description: Print as

fields.Description: Address line 1

fields.Description: Address line 2

fields.Description: Cellular phone number

fields.Description: City

fields.Description: Company name

fields.Name: COUNTRY
fields.Description: Country

fields.Name: COUNTRYCODE
fields.Description: ISO country code. When ISO country codes are enabled in a company, both country and countrycode must be provided.

fields.Name: EMAIL1
fields.Description: Primary email address

fields.Name: CONTRACTID
fields.Description: Contract ID

fields.Description: Item ID

fields.Description: LOCATIONID of an active location . Required if company is multi-entity enabled.

fields.Name: BEGINDATE
fields.Description: Start date in format mm/dd/yyyy . Required for non-recurring contracts.

fields.Name: BILLINGENDDATE
fields.Description: Billing end date in format mm/dd/yyyy . Only used if BILLINGOPTIONS is Use billing template . Leave blank to use line end date

fields.Name: BILLINGFREQUENCY
fields.Description: Billing frequency, which is required if BILLINGOPTIONS is set to Include with every invoice . Use Monthly , Quarterly , Annually , or omit value to inherit from the contract level. (Default: billing frequency for the contract)

fields.Name: BILLINGOPTIONS
fields.Description: Flat/fixed amount frequency. Only used if BILLINGMETHOD is Fixed price . Use either One-time , Use billing template , or Include with every invoice . (Default: Use billing template )

fields.Name: BILLINGSTARTDATE
fields.Description: Billing start date in format mm/dd/yyyy . Only used if BILLINGOPTIONS is Use billing template . Leave blank to use line start date

fields.Name: BILLINGTEMPLATENAME
fields.Description: Billing template. Only used if BILLINGOPTIONS is Use billing template .

fields.Name: BILLTOCONTACTNAME
fields.Description: Bill to contact name for the detail, which can override the Bill to contact name on the contract depending on the value of the Bill to source.

fields.Name: BILLTOSOURCE
fields.Description: Specifies whether the Bill to contact name on the line is overridden when the Bill to contact name on the contract itself is modified. Use Contract value to allow this overriding or User-specified value to preserve the Bill to contact name on the line. (Default: If BILLTOCONTACTNAME is set and not equal to the contract Bill to, defaults to User-specified value , otherwise, defaults to Contract value ).

fields.Name: CLASSID
fields.Description: Class ID

fields.Name: COMMITTEDUSAGEENDACTION
fields.Description: Specifies how to handle the unused quantity. Required when using the Committed quantity type (via USAGELINETYPE ). Use Bill unused quantity , Cancel unused quantity or Do nothing . (Default: Bill unused quantity )

fields.Name: COMMITTEDUSAGEEXCESS
fields.Description: Specifies the action to take when the contract detail end date occurs. Required when using the Committed quantity type (via USAGELINETYPE ). Use Bill overage , Donât allow overage or Do nothing . (Default: Bill overage )

fields.Name: CONTRACT.POSTMEMO
fields.Description: Memo about the post

fields.Name: DEPARTMENTID
fields.Description: Department ID

fields.Name: DISCOUNTPERCENT
fields.Description: Flat/fixed amount calculate discount. Only used if BILLINGMETHOD is Fixed price .

fields.Name: EMPLOYEEID
fields.Description: Employee ID

fields.Name: ENDDATE
fields.Description: End date in format mm/dd/yyyy . Required for non-recurring contracts.

fields.Name: EXCHANGE_RATE
fields.Description: Exchange rate value.

fields.Name: EXCH_RATE_DATE
fields.Description: Exchange rate date in format mm/dd/yyyy . Leave blank to use the start date (if the start is in the future, todayâs date is used instead).

fields.Name: FLATAMOUNT
fields.Description: Base/flat fixed amount.

fields.Name: GLPOSTINGDATE
fields.Description: Date the Unbilled AR and Unbilled deferred revenue posts, in format mm/dd/yyyy . Leave blank to use the contract line start date minus the bill-in-advance period (if this would occur in a closed period, the first date in the first available open period is used instead).

fields.Name: ITEMDESC
fields.Description: Item description

fields.Name: LINETYPE
fields.Description: Line type of the contract line. Use S for Sale (positive contract lines), D for Discount (contract lines with positive Quantity and negative Flat/Fixed), or B for Debook (contract lines with a negative Quantity and a positive Rate).

fields.Name: MULTIPLIER
fields.Description: Flat/fixed amount calculate multiplier. Only used if BILLINGMETHOD is Fixed price .

fields.Name: PRICE
fields.Description: Flat/fixed amount calculate rate. Only used if BILLINGMETHOD is Fixed price .

fields.Name: PROJECTID
fields.Description: Project ID

fields.Name: PRORATEBILLINGPERIOD
fields.Description: Specifies whether to prorate partial months. Use true to prorate, false otherwise. The BILLINGMETHOD must be set to Fixed price and BILLINGOPTIONS must be set to Include with every invoice . (Default: false )

fields.Name: QUANTITY
fields.Description: Flat/fixed amount calculate quantity. Only used if BILLINGMETHOD is Fixed price .

fields.Name: RECURRING
fields.Description: Indicates whether the line is recurring for an Evergreen contract. Use false for No, true for Yes. Defaults to true for an Evergreen contract.

fields.Name: RENEWAL
fields.Description: Renewal. Use false for No, true for Yes. (Default: false )

fields.Name: RENEWALBILLINGTEMPLATENAME
fields.Description: Name of a renewal billing template. Ensure the renewal billing template term is less than or equal to the contract renewal term. Only used if RENEWAL is true . If BILLINGOPTIONS is set to Use billing template on the contract line, a billing template is required. If RENEWALBILLINGTEMPLATENAME is omitted, the system first defaults to the BILLINGTEMPLATENAME on the contract line, then to the default billing template defined on the item.

fields.Name: REVENUE2ENDDATE
fields.Description: Legacy revenue end date in format mm/dd/yyyy . Leave blank to use line end date

fields.Name: REVENUE2STARTDATE
fields.Description: Legacy revenue start date in format mm/dd/yyyy . Leave blank to use line start date

fields.Name: REVENUE2TEMPLATENAME
fields.Description: Legacy revenue template

fields.Name: REVENUEENDDATE
fields.Description: 606 revenue end date in format mm/dd/yyyy . Leave blank to use line end date

fields.Name: REVENUESTARTDATE
fields.Description: 606 revenue start date in format mm/dd/yyyy . Leave blank to use line start date

fields.Name: REVENUETEMPLATENAME
fields.Description: 606 revenue template

fields.Name: REV_REC_ON_INVOICE
fields.Description: Set to false to defer revenue for the contract line. Set to true to automatically post the contract line as revenue when it is invoiced. (Default: false )

fields.Name: SHIPTOCONTACTNAME
fields.Description: Ship to contact name for the detail, which can override the Ship to contact name on the contract depending on the value of the Ship to source.

fields.Name: SHIPTOSOURCE
fields.Description: Specifies whether the Ship to contact name on the line is overridden when the Ship to contact name on the contract itself is modified. Use Contract value to allow this overriding or User-specified value to preserve the Ship to contact name on the line. (Default: If SHIPTOCONTACTNAME is set and not equal to the contract Ship to, defaults to User-specified value , otherwise, defaults to Contract value )

fields.Name: STATE
fields.Description: State in which to create the contract line. Use Draft for a contract line that will not yet post to the GL, Renewal only for a contract line that will be included in the next renewal, or In progress . To move a contract line from Draft to In progress , use the post function. (Default: In progress )

fields.Name: TASKID
fields.Description: Task ID

fields.Name: USAGELINETYPE
fields.Description: Specifies the quantity type. Use Variable for a variable quantity or Committed to predefine a quantity to consume over the course of the contract. (Default: Variable )

fields.Name: USAGEQTYRECUR
fields.Description: Usage quantity recurs. If set to true , every usage record for a line item is treated as a recurring usage record. This means that each period, new usage records are created in order to re-invoice the quantities (for example, user licenses). Changing this field affects how the system calculates usage billing. Only applicable if BILLINGMETHOD is set to Quantity based .

fields.Name: USAGEQTYRESETPERIOD
fields.Description: Reset usage quantity. Determines when the included units are counted and determines when the system billing counter resets. Use either After each invoice or After each renewal . Only applicable if BILLINGMETHOD is set to Quantity based . Also, the contract must have a billing price list set (via PRCLIST ).

fields.Name: RECORDNO
fields.Description: Record number of object. Required if not using name.

fields.Name: CONTRACTREVENUETEMPLATEENTRIES
fields.Description: Template details for either Predefined percentages or for Step revenue for Project percent complete/Task percent complete. When updating template details, you are providing a complete new set of entries (existing entries are deleted).

fields.Name: CONTRACTREVENUETEMPLATEENTRY.PERIODOFFSET
fields.Description: Number of months offset when using the Predefined percentages recognition method

fields.Name: CONTRACTREVENUETEMPLATEENTRY.PERIODPERCENT
fields.Description: Percentage to recognize at either the Number of months offset or at the Threshold percentage. Must add up to 100 percent.

fields.Name: CONTRACTREVENUETEMPLATEENTRY.STEPPERCENT
fields.Description: Threshold percentage for Step revenue when using Project percent complete/Task percent complete. Useful if you recognize revenue in stages as a project progresses, but donât recognize the revenue in exact proportion to the projectâs percentage of completion as many last minute changes usually come in at the end of a project. The percentages must be in ascending order, for example, the first entry might be at 25, the next at 50, 75, then 100.

fields.Name: DESCRIPTION
fields.Description: Description

fields.Name: METHOD
fields.Description: Recognition method. Use S for Straight line, D for Daily rate, Q for Quantity based, P for Predefined percentages, C for Project percent complete, or T for Task percent complete.

fields.Name: POSTINGTYPE
fields.Description: Default posting type. Use Automatic or Manual . For Project percent complete or Task percent complete recognition methods, this field is always set to Manual . (Default: Manual )

fields.Name: RESUMEOPTION
fields.Description: Revenue adjustment option. Determines how the system handles revenue scheduled prior to the itemâs delivery date. This option is only applicable for Straight line or Daily rate revenue recognition methods. You must have Fulfillment status tracking enabled for your company. Use One time , Distributed , or Walk forward .

fields.Name: SOURCE
fields.Description: Recognition method source for Project percent complete or Task percent complete recognition methods. Use Estimated hours , Observed % completed or Planned hours . For Project percent complete , Budgeted hours is available as well. (Default: Estimated hours )

fields.Name: STATUS
fields.Description: Status. Use active for Active otherwise use inactive for Inactive. (Default: active )

fields.Name: STEPTEMPLATE
fields.Description: Step revenue for Project percent complete or Task percent complete recognition methods. Use true to use step revenue (so that you can set threshold percentage values at which revenue can be recognized) or false .

fields.Description: Last modified timestamp (used as incremental-sync watermark)

fields.Description: Identifies the end date of a billed service period based on usage. When used, the service period should be the last day of the month of USAGEDATE. For example, if USAGEDATE falls anytime in September, 2024, then SERVICEPERIODENDDATE should be 09/30/2024.

fields.Name: SERVICEPERIODSTARTDATE
fields.Description: Identifies the start date of a billed service period based on usage. When used, the service period start date should be the first day of the month of USAGEDATE. For example, if USAGEDATE falls anytime in September, 2024, then SERVICEPERIODSTARTDATE should be 09/01/2024.

fields.Description: Usage type. Use T for Billing - variable, M for Billing - committed, O for Billing - overage, F for Revenue, U for Tracked - revenue, N for Tracked - variable.

fields.Description: For PERIODSTARTDATE and PERIODENDDATE , provide both the period start and end date in the format mm/dd/yyyy . For PERIOD , provide the name of a budgetable reporting period (Ex: Month Ended April 2019 ) or a system reporting period (Ex: Current Month ). Partial periods are not supported, and the system reports full period ranges. For example, the whole April period will be used if you enter a start date of 04/15/2019 and an end date of 04/29/2019.

fields.Name: TAXSOLUTIONID
fields.Description: Tax solution name, such as United Kingdom - VAT or Australia - GST . Required only if the company is configured for multiple tax jurisdictions and the transaction is occurring at the top level of the company. The available tax solution names can be found in the Sage Intacct UI in the Taxes application from the top level of a multi-entity company. (GB, AU, and ZA only)

fields.Name: TRX_TAX

fields.Description: ID of the project for this estimate

fields.Name: DEPARTMENTID
fields.Description: Department ID

fields.Name: DESCRIPTION
fields.Description: Description of the project estimate. Use 1000 or fewer characters.

fields.Name: EFFECTIVEDATE
fields.Description: Date that the transaction entry comes into effect from a GL budget or reporting perspective. This can be useful for differentiating approved change entries added later than original entries. Required if POSTTO is set to Effective date and POSTED is true . Specified in the format mm/dd/yyyy .

fields.Name: EMPLOYEEID
fields.Description: Employee ID

fields.Name: ENTRIES
fields.Description: One or more estimate entries. You can add new entries or modify existing entries by supplying their record numbers. Omit this parameter to preserve the existing entries as they are.

fields.Name: ESTIMATEDATE
fields.Description: Date of the project estimate, which must be in a budgetable period. Required if POSTTO is set to Estimate date and POSTED is true . The meaning of this date can vary according to the customerâs workflow. It can be the date the estimate was created, the date the estimate was presented as a quote, or the date of the forecast. Specified in the format mm/dd/yyyy .

fields.Name: EUOM
fields.Description: External unit of measure. Free form field with 200 or fewer characters.

fields.Name: GLBUDGETID
fields.Description: ID of the existing GL budget to use. The budget must be configured for a project estimate in the Sage Intacct UI. If you change the budget ID and POSTED is set to true , any previously posted budget entries are deleted and a new post to the specified GL budget is performed.

fields.Name: ISPRIMARY
fields.Description: Specifies whether this is the primary estimate for the project. Use true for primary, false otherwise. A project can have zero or one primary estimates and multiple non-primary estimates. The first estimate for a project is automatically set as primary when it is created. To set another estimate as primary, update the first estimate to set ISPRIMARY to false and then update the desired estimate to set it to true . (Default: true for the first estimate created for a project, false otherwise)

fields.Name: ITEMID
fields.Description: Item ID

fields.Name: MEMO
fields.Description: Memo for the entry. Use 2000 or fewer characters.

fields.Name: PJESTIMATEID
fields.Description: Unique ID for the project estimate. Required if company does not use document sequencing, or you can provide a value to use instead of the document sequence value.

fields.Name: PJESTIMATETYPENAME
fields.Description: Name of a project estimate type that defines a subset of workflow types. This subset specifies which entries post to the GL budget (if POSTED is true ), and can be used for reporting purposes. When this parameter is not supplied, all workflow types post to the GL budget. If the given project estimate type doesnât include workflow types, no entries post to the GL budget.

fields.Name: POSTED
fields.Description: Specifies whether the estimate posts entries to the GL budget. Use true to post to the entries. You can âunpostâ an estimate by updating it and setting POSTED to false .(Default: false )

fields.Name: POSTTO
fields.Description: GL Budget period, either First period , All periods , Estimate date , or Effective date . If you change the budget period and POSTED is set to true , any previously posted budget entries for that period are deleted and a new post for the specified period is performed.

fields.Name: PRODUCTIONUNITS
fields.Description: Number of production units, which are units that track several inputs of cost (such as for material, labor, equipment). If specified, then amount, quantity, and unit cost all become optional. When specifying production units, you must also provide a task ID, from which the production unit description, if present, is inherited. (Construction subscription)

fields.Name: TASKID

fields.Description: Unit cost, also known as unit rate

fields.Description: Vendor ID

Price - conversion based on the price (for non-inventory items only) Quantity - conversion based on the quantity and unit If using Price , set Quantity to 1 and provide a unit that is a base unit (unit factor is 1). (Construction subscription)

fields.Name: COSTTYPEID

fields.Name: EXTERNALAPPROVEDBY

fields.Name: EXTERNALID

fields.Description: External ref-erence number for this transaction, such as one required by a vendor or customer. (Construction subscription)

fields.Name: EXTERNALSIGNEDBY
fields.Description: Name of the external contact who signed for the transaction. For example, a customer or vendor contact. (Construction subscription)

fields.Name: EXTERNALSIGNEDON
fields.Description: Date the customer or vendor signed for the transaction in the mm/dd/yyyy format (Construction subscription)

fields.Name: EXTERNALVERBALBY
fields.Description: Name of the contact who verbally agreed to the transaction. For example, a customer or vendor contact. (Construction subscription)

fields.Name: FORM1099
fields.Description: Form 1099. false - No true - Yes Vendor must be set up for 1099s.

fields.Name: FORM1099BOX
fields.Description: Form 1099 box

fields.Name: FORM1099TYPE
fields.Description: Form 1099 type

fields.Name: INCLUSIONS

fields.Name: INTERNALAPPROVEDBY

fields.Name: INTERNALAPPROVEDON
fields.Description: Internal approved-on date in the mm/dd/yyyy format (Construction subscription)

fields.Name: INTERNALINITIATEDBY

fields.Name: INTERNALISSUEDBY

fields.Name: INTERNALISSUEDON
fields.Description: Internal issued-on date in the mm/dd/yyyy format (Construction subscription)

fields.Name: INTERNALREFNO

fields.Name: INTERNALSIGNEDBY
fields.Description: ID of the employee who signed for the transaction. (Construction subscription)

fields.Name: INTERNALSIGNEDON
fields.Description: Internal signed-on date in the mm/dd/yyyy format (Construction subscription)

fields.Name: INTERNALSOURCE
fields.Description: Internal reference source when the transaction originated from another document or workflow. Can be an internal or external source. For example, a request for information (RFI) or a project change request. Use 100 or fewer characters. (Construction subscription)

fields.Name: INTERNALSOURCEREFNO
fields.Description: Internal reference source number or ID when the transaction originated from another source. Can be an internal or external number. Use 100 or fewer characters. (Construction subscription)

fields.Name: INTERNALVERBALBY
fields.Description: ID of the employee who verbally agreed to the transaction. (Construction subscription)

fields.Name: ITEMALIASID
fields.Description: Alias name for the item as set up in an item cross reference created for the vendor on this transaction.

fields.Name: ITEMDESC
fields.Description: Item description

fields.Name: ITEMDETAILS
fields.Description: Item details (applicable to inventory or stockable kit item types).

fields.Name: ITEMEXPIRATION
fields.Description: Item expiration date

fields.Name: LINELEVELSIMPLETAXTYPE
fields.Description: Simple tax rate to apply at the line level. Available only if Enable subtotals and Enable line level Simple Tax are enabled for the transaction definition.

fields.Name: LINESUBTOTALS
fields.Description: VAT tax overrides. To override a single tax value you must provide overrides for all taxes on the line item.

fields.Name: LOCATIONID
fields.Description: LOCATIONID of an active location . Required if company is multi-entity enabled.

fields.Name: LOTNO
fields.Description: Lot number.

fields.Name: MEMO
fields.Description: Memo

fields.Name: MESSAGE
fields.Description: Message

fields.Name: NEEDBYDATE
fields.Description: Need by date, which is the date you need the goods to arrive on your premises. (Default value: Due date)

fields.Name: NOTICETOPROCEED
fields.Description: Date when a formal notice to proceed was given in the mm/dd/yyyy format (Construction subscription)

fields.Name: OVERRIDETAXAMOUNT
fields.Description: Override tax amount

fields.Name: PARTIALEXEMPT
fields.Description: Enables partial exemption so that you can reclaim a portion of your input VAT on purchases. Use false for No, true for Yes. (Default: false ) (GB only)

fields.Name: PAYMENTBONDAMOUNT
fields.Description: Amount of the payment bond (Construction subscription)

fields.Name: PAYMENTBONDRECEIVED
fields.Description: Whether payment bond was received. false - No (default) true - Yes (Construction subscription)

fields.Name: PAYMENTBONDREQUIRED
fields.Description: Whether a payment bond is required. false - No (default) true - Yes (Construction subscription)

fields.Name: PAYMENTSURETYCOMPANY
fields.Description: ID of the vendor for the related surety company providing the payment bond (Construction subscription)

fields.Name: PAYMENTTAXCAPTURE
fields.Description: Generate VAT tax record when transaction line is paid. (French companies and entities only) false - No true - Yes

fields.Name: PERCENTVAL
fields.Description: Percent value

fields.Name: PERFORMANCEBONDAMOUNT

fields.Name: PERFORMANCEBONDRECEIVED

fields.Name: PERFORMANCEBONDREQUIRED

fields.Name: REFERENCENO

fields.Name: RELATEDDOCLINEKEY
fields.Description: Record number of a source transaction line to modify when creating a change order. If you omit this parameter but supply relateddockey , a new line will be created on the source transaction. (Construction subscription)

fields.Name: RESPONSEDUE
fields.Description: Date when a response is expected from an external party in the mm/dd/yyyy format (Construction subscription)

fields.Name: RETAINAGEPERCENTAGE
fields.Description: Percentage of the total amount to retain on a transaction that is part of a Construction project. When you supply this value, the value for trx_amountretained is automatically calculated. (Construction or Projects subscription).

fields.Name: REVERSECONVERSION
fields.Description: Enables downstream conversions to be either positive or negative so that you can reduce the previously converted amount of a line item. false - No (default) true - Yes Purchasing configuration option to enable conversion reversal for non-inventory items must be set. (Construction subscription)

fields.Name: REVISEDCOMPLETIONDATE
fields.Description: Revised completion date for the work (caused by changes). Specified in the mm/dd/yyyy format. (Construction subscription)

fields.Name: ROW
fields.Description: Row

fields.Name: SCHEDULEDCOMPLETIONDATE
fields.Description: Original scheduled date for completion of the work in the mm/dd/yyyy format (Construction subscription)

fields.Name: SCHEDULEIMPACT
fields.Description: Details about any impacts on the current schedule. Use 100 or fewer characters. (Construction subscription)

fields.Name: SCHEDULESTARTDATE
fields.Description: Scheduled start date in the mm/dd/yyyy format (Construction subscription)

fields.Name: SCOPE
fields.Description: Details about the expected scope of work to be performed or materials to be delivered. Use 4000 or fewer characters. (Construction subscription)

fields.Name: SERIALNO
fields.Description: Serial number.

fields.Name: SHIPPINGMETHOD
fields.Description: Shipping method

fields.Name: SOURCEDOCID
fields.Description: For multi-document conversions, the document ID of a source document to convert from to create the purchasing transaction. Different potransitem objects in the potransitems array can convert from different source documents.

fields.Name: SOURCEDOCLINEID
fields.Description: For multi-document conversions, the RECORDNO of the source line to convert from in the createdfrom transaction document. sourcelinekey must also be set.

fields.Name: SOURCELINEKEY
fields.Description: Source line to convert this line from. Use the RECORDNO of the line from the createdfrom transaction document.

fields.Name: STATE
fields.Description: State. S - Submitted A - Approved X - Partially Approved R - Declined I - Draft O - Pending D - Closed G - In Progress C - Converted P - Partially Converted

fields.Name: SUBSTANTIALCOMPLETIONDATE
fields.Description: Date the work is considered substantially complete in the mm/dd/yyyy format. Typically used as a milestone to identify when payment obligations are due. (Construction subscription)

fields.Name: SUBTOTALS
fields.Description: Subtotal lines

fields.Name: UNIT

fields.Name: TOTAL.Q_QV

fields.Description: Warehouse

fields.Name: AR_ACCOUNTS
fields.Description: Transaction posting account mapping for either Accounts Payable or General Ledger transaction posting. There must be one credit and one debit account. Note: AR_ACCOUNT is shared across applications, which is why there isnât an AP_ACCOUNT mapping parameter as you might expect.

fields.Name: CATEGORY
fields.Description: Workflow category. Use Q for Quote, O for Order, S for Shipping, I for Invoice, or R for Return.

fields.Name: CONVTYPE
fields.Description: Partial conversion handling. Use Close Transaction , Leave Transaction Open , or Close Original and Create Back Order . (Default: Close Transaction )

fields.Name: CREATETYPE
fields.Description: Create policy for the transaction type in the Security Configuration. Use New document or Convert to specify that the user can create this transaction as a standalone transaction or by converting the previous transaction in the workflow, or use Convert only to specify that the user can create this transaction only by converting the previous transaction in the workflow. (Default: New document or Convert )

fields.Name: CREDITLIMITCHECK
fields.Description: Enforce credit limit. Specifies whether to enforce customer credit limit restrictions in transactions created from this template. Use true for needing a credit check, false otherwise. (Default: false )

fields.Name: DEFAULT_WAREHOUSE
fields.Description: Default warehouse. Only applicable if warehouse selection method is set to Use the default warehouse . A userâs Default warehouse setting overrides this selection.

fields.Name: DELTYPE
fields.Description: Delete policy for the transaction type in the Security Configuration. Use No Edit to specify that the user cannot delete this transaction after it is created, Before Printing to specify that the user can delete this transaction until it has been printed to PDF, or All to specify that the user can delete this transaction as allowed by the transactionâs condition. (Default: No Edit )

fields.Name: DESCRIPTION
fields.Description: Meaningful description for the transaction definition. Use 100 characters or fewer.

fields.Name: DISABLEVAT
fields.Description: For a VAT enabled company, disables tax capture for the general ledger. (Default: false ) (AU, GB, ZA only)

fields.Name: DISPLAY_BASECURRENCY
fields.Description: Display base currency as well as transaction currency for multi-currency. Use true to display both, false otherwise. Only applicable for multi-currency companies. (Default: false )

fields.Name: DOCCLASS
fields.Description: Template type for the transaction. The type determines whether certain fields appear on the transaction (for example, Expiration Date vs. Ship Date). Use Quote , Order , List , Invoice , Adjustment , or Other . (Default: Quote )

fields.Name: EDITTYPE
fields.Description: Edit policy for the transaction type in the Security Configuration. Use No Edit to specify that the user cannot edit this transaction after it is created, Before Printing to specify that the user can edit this transaction until it has been printed to PDF, or All to specify that the user can edit this transaction as allowed by the transactionâs condition. (Default: No Edit )

fields.Name: ENABLEADDINFOBOND
fields.Description: Enables Bond parameters. This includes PERFORMANCEBONDREQUIRED , PERFORMANCEBONDRECEIVED , PERFORMANCEBONDAMOUNT , PERFORMANCESURETYCOMPANYKEY , PERFORMANCESURETYCOMPANY , PAYMENTBONDREQUIRED , PAYMENTBONDRECEIVED , PAYMENTBONDAMOUNT , PAYMENTSURETYCOMPANYKEY , and PAYMENTSURETYCOMPANY .

fields.Name: ENABLEADDINFOEXTERNALREF
fields.Description: Enables External Reference parameters. This includes all parameters prefixed with EXTERNAL .

fields.Name: ENABLEADDINFOINTERNALREF
fields.Description: Enables Internal Reference parameters. This includes all parameters prefixed with INTERNAL .

fields.Name: ENABLEADDINFOSCHEDULE
fields.Description: Enables Schedule parameters. This includes SCHEDULESTARTDATE , ACTUALSTARTDATE , SCHEDULEDCOMPLETIONDATE , REVISEDCOMPLETIONDATE , SUBSTANTIALCOMPLETIONDATE , ACTUALCOMPLETIONDATE , NOTICETOPROCEED , RESPONSEDUE , EXECUTEDON , and SCHEDULEDIMPACT .

fields.Name: ENABLEADDINFOSCOPE
fields.Description: Enables Scope parameters. This includes SCOPE , INCLUSIONS , EXCLUSIONS , and TERMS .

fields.Name: ENABLEDOCCHANGE
fields.Description: Enable change management for transactions. Use Enable Change for source transactions that can accept change orders, use Change Order for transactions that are themselves change orders, or No Change for transactions that do not use change management. You can modify an existing transaction definition to be a source. You can modify an existing transaction definition without any transactions to be a change order. You can modify an existing source transaction definition to prevent change orders if...

fields.Name: ENABLEOVERRIDETAX
fields.Description: Line item tax. Specifies whether the user can override whether an item is taxable. Only applicable when subtotals are enabled (via SHOW_TOTALS ).

fields.Name: ENABLE_RETAINAGE

fields.Name: ENTITY_PROP.ENABLEOVERRIDETAX

fields.Name: EXCHRATETYPES

fields.Name: HIDEPRICE
fields.Description: Specifies whether the user can hide line item prices in transactions created from the transaction definition. Use true if you want to allow this, false otherwise. The OVERRIDE_PRICE field must be set to false if this field is set to true . (Default: false )

fields.Name: INHERIT_SOURCE_DOCNO
fields.Description: Inherit the source document number from the transaction from which this transaction is converted. Use true to inherit the numbering, false otherwise. Can be overridden in the Entity Settings . (Default: false )

fields.Name: INVGL_ACCOUNT.DEBIT_CREDIT

fields.Name: IN_OUT

fields.Name: LINELEVELSIMPLETAX
fields.Description: Enable line level Simple Tax. Use true to enable line level Simple Tax, false otherwise. (Default: false )

fields.Name: OVERRIDE_EXCH_RATE_TYPE
fields.Description: Exchange rate and exchange rate type. Specifies whether the user can edit the Exchange rate and/or Exchange rate type fields on the transaction. Use true if you want to allow this, false otherwise. (Default: true )

fields.Name: OVERRIDE_PRICE
fields.Description: Override suggested price. Specifies whether the user can override the price proposed by the system. Use true if you want to allow this, false otherwise. This field must be set to false if the HIDEPRICE field is set to true . (Default: true )

fields.Name: POSTTOGL
fields.Description: Enable reversal posting, which can be any additional posting, not just for reversals. Use true to enable, false otherwise. If set to true , you must supply the Reversal GL entry account mapping in the Posting Configuration . (Default: false )

fields.Name: PRESERVE_SEQNUM

fields.Name: PRIMARYDOC
fields.Description: Enables the primary document feature within a workflow. Use true to enable, false otherwise. When set to true , all documents created using the purchasing transaction definition are marked as primary documents, and all documents that result from conversions or change orders from a primary document have links back to the primary document. Available in companies with a Construction subscription. When you set PRIMARYDOC to true , you canât disable it. (Default: false )

fields.Name: RECORDNO
fields.Description: Primary key

fields.Name: createdfrom
fields.Description: The DOCID from a previous Build Kit transaction.

fields.Description: Transaction date.

fields.Name: day
fields.Description: Day dd

fields.Name: itemid
fields.Description: ITEMID of the stockable kit that was built.

fields.Name: month
fields.Description: Month mm

fields.Name: quantity
fields.Description: Quantity of the item or stockable kit. If components are drawn from different lots or bins, create separate itemdetail objects for each location and set quantity to the number of items from each. Set to 1 for serial number tracking.

fields.Name: stkittransitems
fields.Description: Transaction lines showing the stockable kits that were built. Must have at least 1.

fields.Description: Pre-defined transaction definition to create a disassemble kit transaction. Use Disassemble Kits

fields.Description: WAREHOUSEID of the warehouse where the newly built stockable kits are located. There must be sufficient inventory at the specified warehouse to build the stockable kits.

fields.Name: year
fields.Description: Year yyyy

fields.Name: bin
fields.Description: BINID of the bin where the component is stored , or where the stockable kit will be stored. Bin tracking must be enabled.

fields.Name: componentid
fields.Description: ITEMID of the item or kit that is a component in the stockable kit. You must include this parameter for each component that you want to track. Do not include this parameter for the stockable kit.

fields.Name: departmentid
fields.Description: DEPARTMENTID of a department .

fields.Name: documentno
fields.Description: Document number to identify this transaction. Leave blank if transaction numbering is enabled in the transaction definition. The document number will be appended to the transaction type to create the DOCID , such as Build Kits-60 .

fields.Name: externalid
fields.Description: External ID

fields.Name: itemdesc
fields.Description: Stockable kit description.

fields.Name: itemdetails
fields.Description: Inventory tracking information for components and the stockable kits.

fields.Name: itemexpiration
fields.Description: Expiration date of the component or of the newly created stockable kit. Expiration tracking must be enabled.

fields.Name: locationid
fields.Description: LOCATIONID of a location .

fields.Name: lotno
fields.Description: Lot number. ENABLE_LOT_CATEGORY must be true for the item.

fields.Name: message
fields.Description: Message that you want to include in the transaction. It appears in the PDF file when you print the build transaction.

fields.Name: referenceno
fields.Description: Reference number that can be used to search or sort transactions. You can use purchase order numbers or request for quote numbers to help track build kit transactions.

fields.Name: serialno
fields.Description: Serial number of the component item or stockable kit, or the serial number to be applied to the finished stockable kit. Required if serial number tracking is enabled for the item or stockable kit.

fields.Name: unit
fields.Description: Unit of measure to base quantity off, such as Each , Pair , or Dozen .

fields.Description: Secondary URL

fields.Name: VENDORACCOUNTNO
fields.Description: Vendor account number

fields.Name: VENDORACCTNOLOCATIONS
fields.Description: Vendor location assigned account numbers (alternative to VENDOR_ACCTNO_LOC_HEAD ). If this parameter is omitted, the original set remains intact. If you supply new elements, these replace the original set. Passing an empty VENDORACCTNOLOCATIONS element deletes the set. If this parameter and VENDOR_ACCTNO_LOC_HEAD are both provided, VENDORACCTNOLOCATIONS is used.

fields.Name: VENDORBANKFILEDETAILS
fields.Description: Vendor bank file payment details. The values you provide are validated if FILEPAYMENTSERVICE is set to BANKFILE . (AU, GB, ZA only)

fields.Name: VENDORCONTACTS
fields.Description: Contact list (alternative to CONTACT_LIST_INFO ). If this parameter is omitted, the original contact list remains intact. If you supply new elements, these are appended to the list. Passing an empty VENDORCONTACTS element deletes the contact list. If this parameter and CONTACT_LIST_INFO are both provided, VENDORCONTACTS is used. If there is not an existing contact list, any values supplied for other contacts (Primary, Pay to, or Return to) are used to create a contact list.

fields.Name: VENDOREMAILTEMPLATES
fields.Description: Vendor email templates. If this parameter is omitted, the original vendor email templates remain intact. If you supply new elements, these replace the set of templates. Passing an empty VENDOREMAILTEMPLATES element deletes the set of templates.

fields.Name: VENDOR_ACCTNO_LOC_HEAD
fields.Description: Vendor location assigned account numbers (alternative to VENDORACCTNOLOCATIONS ). If this parameter is omitted, the original set remains intact. Multiple individual VENDOR_ACCTNO_LOC_HEAD elements may be passed. If this parameter and VENDORACCTNOLOCATIONS are both provided, VENDORACCTNOLOCATIONS is used.

fields.Description: Account type for the vendor bank account to which payments are made. Use 1 for cheque account, 2 for savings account, 3 for transmission account, or 4 for bond account.

fields.Name: ZA.PROOFOFPYMT
fields.Description: Proof of payment flag, which specifies whether to print the proof of payment when the bank file payment is authorized. Use false for No, true for Yes.

fields.Name: Custom field name

fields.Name: ENABLENEGATIVEINV
fields.Description: Enable negative inventory for this warehouse. This option lets you enable negative inventory for a specific warehouse, assuming that the company is not already configured to allow negative inventory. Use true to enable negative inventory for this warehouse, otherwise use false . (Default: false )

fields.Name: ENABLE_REPLENISHMENT
fields.Description: Enable replenishment for this warehouse. Use true to enable, otherwise use false . (Default: true )

fields.Description: Last modified timestamp (used as incremental-sync watermark)
